templates.title: Address History Explanation Letter Template
templates.summary: A self-service guidance page for preparing a truthful address history explanation letter template without creating fake documents or guaranteeing approval.
safePreview: State the purpose of the letter in one sentence.
Explain the facts in chronological order using truthful details.
Reference supporting documents without exaggerating what they prove.
Close with the specific review step you are asking for.
templates.paidBoundary: Public previews explain structure and safe use. Paid PDF/DOCX kit files remain protected behind Stripe-verified download.
